regime_fall.current_status: Massive U.S. and Israeli strikes on March 28 targeted Iran's nuclear facilities, military infrastructure, and industrial sites across multiple provinces, with approximately 9,000 targets struck and operations nearing completion within weeks. The military-dominated regime under new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues rejecting ceasefire terms and maintaining offensive capabilities despite intensive air campaign, while U.S. military presence expands with 50,000+ troops deployed and additional reinforcements en route.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. and Israeli coordinated air campaign targeting approximately 9,000 Iranian military, nuclear, and infrastructure targets reached peak intensity on March 28, 2026, with Pentagon indicating operations nearing completion within weeks as ground force reinforcements deploy to theater.
